nodes.name: Webhook (POST site_order_id)
nodes.notes: Accepts {site_order_id, triggered_by, triggered_by_detail}. triggered_by must be 'manual' | 'cron' | 'procore_webhook' | 'api'. For testing: trigger manually via n8n editor or POST with body {"site_order_id":"aaaaaaaa-0001-0001-0001-000000000001","triggered_by":"manual","triggered_by_detail":"test from editor"}

nodes.name: Call check_payment_eligibility()
nodes.notes: Pure compliance check via Supabase RPC. Returns is_eligible, subcontractor_id, ap_integration_type, blocking_alert_count, blocking_alert_levels, reason. Per ADR-001.

parameters.text:
🚫 *Payment Gate: BLOCKED*

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| *Site Order* | `{{ $json.site_order_id }}` |
| *Subcontractor* | `{{ $json.subcontractor_id }}` |
| *Active Alerts* | {{ $json.blocking_alert_count }} (level(s): {{ $json.blocking_alert_levels.join(', ') }}) |
| *Reason* | `{{ $json.reason }}` |
| *Trigger* | {{ $json.triggered_by }} — {{ $json.triggered_by_detail }} |
| *AP Path* | {{ $json.ap_integration_type || 'unknown' }} |

_Recorded: payment_decisions table · Execution: `{{ $json.n8n_execution_id }}`_

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.payment_decisions (
  site_order_id,
  subcontractor_id,
  triggered_by,
  triggered_by_detail,
  is_eligible,
  ap_integration_type,
  blocking_alert_count,
  blocking_alert_levels,
  reason,
  action_taken,
  action_detail,
  status,
  n8n_execution_id,
  n8n_workflow_id,
  completed_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.site_order_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.subcontractor_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.triggered_by }}',
  '{{ ($('Merge Decision Context').first().json.triggered_by_detail || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.is_eligible }}::boolean,
  {{ $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.ap_integration_type ? "'" + $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.ap_integration_type + "'::ap_integration_type_enum" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.blocking_alert_count }}::int,
  ARRAY[{{ ($('Merge Decision Context').first().json.blocking_alert_levels || []).join(',') }}]::int[],
  '{{ ($('Merge Decision Context').first().json.reason || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.is_eligible ? ($('Merge Decision Context').first().json.ap_integration_type === 'procore' ? 'released_via_procore' : $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.ap_integration_type === 'quickbooks' ? 'released_via_quickbooks' : 'released_manual_review') : 'blocked_alert_sent' }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify({ is_eligible: $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.is_eligible, ap_integration_type: $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.ap_integration_type, blocking_alert_count: $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.blocking_alert_count, blocking_alert_levels: $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.blocking_alert_levels, reason: $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.reason, decision_source: 'derived_from_merge_context' }).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  'completed',
  '{{ $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.n8n_execution_id }}',
  '{{ $('Merge Decision Context').first().json.n8n_workflow_id }}',
  NOW()
) RETURNING id;

nodes.name: Audit: payment_decisions INSERT
nodes.notes: All branches converge here. Single audit row per decision, regardless of routing path. Status='completed' since action was already dispatched upstream.
